note: No video bundler configured. Set EXTERNAL_VIDEO_WEBHOOK for production or BUNDLE_PROVIDER=ffmpeg (plus `npm i ffmpeg-static fluent-ffmpeg`) for local dev.
title: Tear Down This Wall
hook: One Cold War line ended a 28-year nightmare.
script: On June 12, 1987, Ronald Reagan stared down the Berlin Wall and dared Gorbachev to destroy it. Soviet officers smirked. They called it Hollywood theater. Just two years later, drunk teenagers with sledgehammers proved him right.
